Case Number: 25STCV13276

Hearing Date: March 3, 2026

Department: 52

The Court, Judge Robert M. Smith presiding, issues the following tentative ruling:

MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES

TENTATIVE: The motion is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Plaintiff shall provide further responses to Special Interrogatories Nos. 1-5 within 20 days. The request for sanctions is denied.

If any party contests this tentative ruling, that party shall notify opposing counsel and the court on or before 4:00 PM on the court day preceding the hearing.
